raw: {"perspective": "Readiness Manager", "summary": "Azure registration is geo-blocked for Azerbaijan. VOLAURA, Inc. can register with Delaware address + EIN. ElevenLabs free tier is sufficient for MVP. Alternative: Azure Speech Services costs $4.99/1M chars, ElevenLabs costs $5/1M chars.", "key_sources": ["Azure for Startups", "ElevenLabs pricing", "Stripe Atlas Perks"], "gaps_in_current_canon": "Lack of clear registration path for Azure from Azerbaijan", "proposed_action": "Register Azure via US company account (VOLAURA, Inc., Delaware C Corp, EIN 37-2231884) and use ElevenLabs free tier for video generation pipeline", "whistleblower_flag": null}
summary: Azure registration is geo-blocked for Azerbaijan. VOLAURA, Inc. can register with Delaware address + EIN. ElevenLabs free tier is sufficient for MVP. Alternative: Azure Speech Services costs $4.99/1M chars, ElevenLabs costs $5/1M chars.
gaps_in_current_canon: Lack of clear registration path for Azure from Azerbaijan
proposed_action: Register Azure via US company account (VOLAURA, Inc., Delaware C Corp, EIN 37-2231884) and use ElevenLabs free tier for video generation pipeline
